commit_scope: Heal native runtime observation after the deployed /api/attention/kernel-runtime route still flapped between native-kernel and Python 404. The stable BML front-door now serves the runtime attention route at higher Traefik priority, while typed BML RouteCell requests receive router-owned live metrics so the response remains an actual native observation.

commands: direct local form-kernel-rust.exe serve --routes deploy/front-door/api.bml probe for GET /api/attention/kernel-runtime
local_validation.notes: The local BML front-door probe returned HTTP 200 with X-Form-Router native-kernel, X-Form-Handler api_attention_kernel_runtime, native_route_count 72, total_requests 1, native_requests 1, and python_authority false on the cold first request. The pre-deploy public runtime_surface_report still sees /api/attention/kernel-runtime as 404, which is the live production gap this branch changes.

ci_validation.notes: CI will run after the branch is pushed and the PR opens.

deploy_validation.environment: Hostinger native kernel-router BML front door
deploy_validation.notes: Before this repair, production was deployed at f58855eac40a6b07c5ab494fc7ad061a6612f0fe but repeated public probes of /api/attention/kernel-runtime alternated between native-kernel, 404, and occasional timeout. BML native read routes such as /api/ready and /api/utils/kernel_status stayed stable, so this change moves ordinary runtime attention observation to that stable native front door and keeps the older production-manifest attention route available underneath.

phase_gate.reason: Local native proof passed; merge, Hostinger deploy, and repeated public probes remain pending.

evidence_refs: Wellness on 2026-06-22 reported deploy aligned at f58855ea but kernel-native API runtime-share was strained because the public front-door probe returned status 404 with no router header.

Manual repeated probes showed /api/attention/kernel-runtime flipping between native-kernel, 404, and occasional timeout, while /api/ready and /api/utils/kernel_status stayed native-kernel through the BML front door.

The Rust router now prepends router-owned metrics into typed KernelHTTPRequest query fields and passes an in-flight snapshot to native handlers so a cold first BML attention response has nonzero total/native request counts.
The BML front door now owns api_attention_kernel_runtime, Traefik routes it at priority 1186 to coherence-api-kernel-bml-front-door, and the deploy canary probes the handler before rollout proceeds.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The public /api/attention/kernel-runtime observation route should be served consistently by the stable BML native front door with native proof headers and live router metrics, while the production-manifest native default and explicit fallback canaries continue to prove the sibling native instance.
test_flows: local release kernel serves the BML attention route with native proof headers and nonzero cold metrics.
static deploy-path check pins the higher-priority BML attention ingress, native proof handler, and deploy canary probe.
post-merge deploy should pass verify_kernel_canary_public_gate.sh, including handler api_attention_kernel_runtime on the public attention route.
